properties.description: Unique identifier for division-level aggregated attrition risk record.
properties.business_rules: Must be unique, Cannot be null
properties.business_description: Unique identifier combining division and assessment date.
properties.data_quality_checks: Check for null values, Validate uniqueness
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by division, Filter by date

properties.description: Date of the division-level attrition risk assessment.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be a valid date
properties.business_description: Reference date for divisional attrition snapshot.
properties.data_quality_checks: Ensure not in future, Validate date format
properties.aggregation_suggestions: COUNT by date, GROUP BY month

properties.description: Organizational division or business unit.
properties.common_patterns: Sales, Marketing, HR, IT, Finance, Operations
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must match User_csod.division values
properties.business_description: Business unit for analyzing attrition risk by division.
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by specific division, Compare divisions
properties.aggregation_suggestions: COUNT by division, GROUP BY division

properties.description: Total number of active employees in the division.
properties.business_description: Division size for per-capita risk normalization.
properties.data_quality_checks: Ensure positive values, Validate against User_csod

properties.description: Average composite attrition risk score for the division.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be between 0 and 100
properties.business_description: Primary KPI for divisional retention health.
properties.aggregation_suggestions: AVERAGE across divisions, MAX, MIN, RANK

properties.description: Actual attrition rate for the division (trailing 12 months).
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be between 0 and 100
properties.business_description: Historical attrition reality check against predictive risk scores.

properties.description: Number of employees at critical attrition risk in division.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be >= 0, Must be <= divisionHeadcount
properties.business_description: Volume of imminent departures requiring urgent intervention.

properties.description: Number of employees at high attrition risk in division.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be >= 0, Must be <= divisionHeadcount

properties.description: Number of critical-skill employees at high/critical risk in division.
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by non-zero, Prioritize high counts
properties.aggregation_suggestions: SUM, PERCENTAGE of critical skills population

properties.description: Number of people managers at high/critical risk in division.
properties.business_description: Managers at departure risk with potential team impact.

properties.description: Average employee tenure in the division.
properties.filtering_suggestions: Compare divisions, Filter low tenure (<18 months)

properties.description: Number of new hires (0-6 months) at high/critical risk in division.
properties.business_description: Early-stage attrition indicator suggesting onboarding issues.
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by non-zero, Identify problem divisions

properties.description: Total estimated replacement cost for critical/high risk employees in division.
properties.business_rules: Can be null if not calculated, Must be >= 0
properties.business_description: Financial exposure from potential attrition in division.
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter high-cost divisions, Calculate total exposure
properties.aggregation_suggestions: SUM for total, AVERAGE by division

properties.description: Rank of division by avgAttritionRiskScore (1 = lowest risk/best).
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be > 0, Lower is better
properties.data_quality_checks: Ensure positive values, Validate ranking logic

properties.description: Attrition risk trend direction for the division (7-day comparison).
properties.business_rules: Can be null for first assessment, Valid values: 'Improving', 'Deteriorating', 'Stable'
properties.business_description: Directional indicator for divisional retention health.
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by Deteriorating for priority attention

properties.description: Composite retention health score for the division (0-100).
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be between 0 and 100, Higher is better
properties.business_description: Division-level composite KPI combining risk, tenure, and engagement.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate range 0-100, Ensure inverse correlation with risk
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter poor health (<60), Filter excellent health (>80)

properties.description: Average learning engagement score for the division.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be between 0 and 100
properties.business_description: Divisional learning culture indicator correlating with retention.

properties.description: Priority level for retention intervention resources.
properties.business_description: Resource allocation priority for retention efforts.
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by Urgent and High, Prioritize interventions

relationships.name: source_assessments_relationship
relationships.condition: AttritionRisk_Division.division = User_csod.division AND User_csod.userId = AttritionRisk_Silver.userId AND AttritionRisk_Division.assessmentDate = DATE(AttritionRisk_Silver.assessmentDate)

properties.displayName: Division Aggregates to Source Assessments Relationship
properties.description: Each division summary aggregates all employee risk assessments for that division via User_csod.division
Division metrics linked to organizational hierarchy
Gold layer table containing division-level aggregated attrition risk metrics enabling organizational comparison and targeted retention strategies.
properties.business_purpose: Enables divisional retention scorecards, peer benchmarking, resource allocation, and divisional leader accountability for talent retention.
properties.data_lineage: Aggregated from AttritionRisk_Silver table with daily refresh, grouped by division.
properties.data_retention: Data retained for 3 years for trend analysis.
properties.key_relationships: Aggregates from AttritionRisk_Silver, joins with User_csod for division hierarchy
properties.queryPatterns: ["Filter by division for divisional risk reporting", "Filter by assessmentDate for time-series analysis", "Group by division for organizational comparison", "Calculate aggregate risk metrics (avgRiskScore, totalHighRiskEmployees) by division", "Join with User_csod for organizational context", "Compare divisions using peer benchmarking metrics", "Filter by riskLevel for divisional risk prioritization", "Calculate division-level engagement trends"]
properties.useCases: ["Divisional Retention Scorecards: Generate division-level attrition risk summaries", "Peer Benchmarking: Compare risk metrics across divisions", "Resource Allocation: Identify divisions requiring retention resources", "Divisional Accountability: Track division leader performance on talent retention", "Organizational Comparison: Compare risk levels across organizational segments", "Strategic Planning: Use divisional data for targeted retention strategies", "Trend Analysis: Track division-level risk trends over time", "Performance Tracking: Measure divisional retention intervention effectiveness"]
